functions.name: parseWorkbook
functions.description: Reads an uploaded .xlsx File and returns normalized sheet arrays (Ranking, Equipas_Pais, Treinadores, Jogadores, Pesos_Fixos).
refactorSuggestions: validate headers and provide warnings for unexpected columns

functions.name: exportAllToExcel
functions.signature: async function exportAllToExcel(resultados: Record<string, RankingTable>): Promise<void>
functions.description: Generates an Excel workbook with an index and one worksheet per table, and triggers a browser download.
functions.sideEffects: Creates Blob, triggers DOM anchor click
tests: small resultados => generated workbook has sheets and hyperlinks
refactorSuggestions: stream large sheets to avoid memory spikes

functions.name: normalizeSeason
functions.signature: function normalizeSeason(raw: RawSheets, epoca: string): NormSeason
functions.description: Normalizes raw workbook sheets into a typed season structure used by the computation engine.
tests: various sheet shapes, numeric parsing (commas/dots), VP parsing suffixes
refactorSuggestions: centralize number parsing helpers; expose parse errors for logs

functions.name: computeAll
functions.signature: function computeAll(seasons: NormSeason[], modo: ModoAtivo): Record<string, RankingTable>
functions.description: Core computation that builds all ranking tables from normalized seasons according to active modes.
functions.complexity: O(S * R) where S=seasons, R=rows per season (multiple passes for different aggregations)
tests: multi-season dataset => consistent ranking keys and epochKeys
refactorSuggestions: split into smaller modules per domain (club, pais, treinador, jogador) for testability

functions.name: computeEpochPositions
functions.signature: function computeEpochPositions(t: RankingTable): Map<any, Record<string, number>>
functions.description: Computes per-row epoch position numbers used when exporting epoch positions to Excel.
tests: table with epochKeys returns expected __pos_ fields

functions.name: DataTable
functions.signature: export function DataTable({ table, limit }: { table: RankingTable; limit?: number })
functions.description: Generic table renderer with sorting, filtering, pagination, column visibility and epoch rank badges.
functions.complexity: renders O(pageSize) rows; filtering/sorting O(rows log rows)
tests: render page with table, filter by column, persist column visibility
refactorSuggestions: memoize heavy sorts; extract filtering logic for unit tests

functions.name: UploadPanel
functions.description: UI to upload Excel files, pick seasons, process (normalize + computeAll) and export results.
functions.sideEffects: invokes parseWorkbook, computeAll, exportAllToExcel; updates app store (useFMStore)
functions.complexity: UI interactions; processing is delegated to computeAll
tests: simulate file input; mock parseWorkbook and computeAll
refactorSuggestions: surface parsing errors to the UI with per-file diagnostics

functions.name: RankingEvolutionChart
functions.signature: export function RankingEvolutionChart({ data, title, showLegend, seriesKey })
functions.description: Line chart component to visualize position evolution across epochs (uses recharts).
tests: renders empty state, sorts epochs chronologically

functions.name: WorldMap
functions.description: Map visualization (react-leaflet) that shows top clubs/players by country using resultados store.
functions.sideEffects: uses resultados from store; sets state; depends on hardcoded country coords

functions.name: PageHeader
functions.signature: export function PageHeader({ title, description }: { title: string; description?: string })
functions.description: Common page header with back link and title.
calledBy: many pages: index, tabela, perfil pages

functions.name: buildClubProfile
functions.signature: function buildClubProfile(seasons: NormSeason[], nome: string): ClubProfile | null
functions.description: Aggregates seasons to build a club profile: historical positions, trophies, promotions and current squad summary.
functions.complexity: O(S * R) over seasons and their rankings
tests: club with no data => null; club with multiple seasons => correct markers

functions.name: buildPlayerProfile
functions.signature: function buildPlayerProfile(seasons: NormSeason[], nome: string): PlayerProfile | null
functions.description: Aggregates player stats across seasons (gols, assistências, per-epoch breakdown).
functions.complexity: O(S * J) where J = players per season
tests: player with multiple seasons => totals and per-epoch list

functions.name: buildCoachProfile
functions.signature: function buildCoachProfile(seasons: NormSeason[], nome: string): CoachProfile | null
functions.description: Aggregates coach history and achievements across seasons.
tests: coach with no seasons => null; coach with multiple promotions/titles aggregated

pages.purpose: Index page: shows UploadPanel and links to available pages defined in page-registry.
pages.seo: uses root head metadata via root route

pages.purpose: Generic table page that renders a ranking table by key using DataTable.
userFlows: Open table by key, filter/sort/paginate rows

pages.purpose: Dashboard view that composes multiple small top-N tables or special visualizations (e.g., WorldMap).
userFlows: View top 10 slices for a set of keys defined in SETS

pages.purpose: Scouting/insight tool: choose a ranking table and inspect an entity's evolution, rating and compare multiple entities.
rankingComponents: computes profile metric from table rows (positions, vals)
userFlows: Select ranking → search entity → view evolution & positions → compare up to 5 entities

pages.purpose: Player profile page: totals, per-epoch history and links to clubs.
userFlows: Open player profile → view per-epoch stats → navigate to club

pages.purpose: Club profile: trophies, promotions, coach history, ranking evolution and squad summary.
userFlows: Open club → view coach, squad, evolution charts

pages.purpose: Coach profile (aggregates passagens and markers) — uses buildCoachProfile.
userFlows: Open coach profile → view passagens and titles

pages.purpose: Country profile — aggregates clubs and positions by country via buildCountryProfile.
userFlows: Open country → view top clubs and historical positions

rankings.name: Pontos_Totais
calculationSteps: group Pts by team across seasons
rankings.performanceNotes: linear in total ranking rows per season; many derived tables reuse grouped maps

rankings.name: Coef_Clube_Fixos (and Coef_Clube / Coef_Clube_Dinamicos)
rankings.dataSource: per-season Pts × weight + bonus; last 5 epochs weighted by COEF_WEIGHTS
calculationSteps: for each team and epoch compute v = Pts * weight(div) + bonus(inf)
for last 5 epochs multiply by temporal weights [1.0,0.8,0.6,0.4,0.2] and sum
rankings.performanceNotes: maps per team then iterate last5 — acceptable for typical football datasets

rankings.name: Ranking_Underdogs
rankings.dataSource: Pts / (GM + 1) per season, averaged across seasons

rankings.name: Treinador / Ranking_Treinador / Treinador_Coef
rankings.dataSource: association of coach → club per epoch and club Pts

rankings.name: Player club aggregations (e.g., CA_Clubes, VP_Clubes, Salarios)
rankings.dataSource: lastSeason.jogadores grouped by club (top28 per club for some metrics)
computedColumns: avg CA/CP, sum VP/Salario, N players

summary.notes: computeAll produces many tables (keys visible in engine.ts). DataTables and pages render them. UploadPanel is the single processing entrypoint.
summary.howToRun: Open app, upload .xlsx via UploadPanel, click Process to run normalizeSeason + computeAll; results stored in useFMStore and rendered across pages.
